command: Use the review-loop:plan skill on the following trivial work item: Document that running `/review-loop:plan` initializes a session file with `## Current Phase: planning`. The goal of this invocation is to validate that the plan skill creates a session file under .review-loop/sessions/{uuid}.md and produces at least one reviewer prompt before exiting. Treat any existing context as sufficient; run a single planning round and stop as soon as the Reviewer responds.
